title: Social Media
description: For questions 1–8, read the text below and choose which answer (A, B, C or D) best completes each gap.

content.text: Social media has transformed the way we communicate, but it has also (0) rise to new concerns about privacy and mental health. Studies have shown that excessive use of social networking sites can have a negative (1) on young people's wellbeing. Many teenagers feel (2) to check their phones constantly, fearing they might (3) out on important updates from friends. This phenomenon, known as FOMO, has become increasingly common in recent years. (4), social media has enabled people to stay in (5) with friends and family across the globe. It has also (6) a significant role in raising awareness about social and political issues. Activists have successfully used platforms like Twitter to (7) attention to causes that might otherwise go unnoticed. Experts suggest that the key to healthy social media use lies in finding the right (8) between online and offline activities.

example.explanation: 'Given rise to' es la expresión fija que significa 'dar lugar a' o 'provocar'.

questions.explanation: 'Have an impact on' es la colocación correcta para indicar un efecto significativo.
'Feel compelled to' indica sentirse impulsado a hacer algo por presión interna.
'Miss out on' es el phrasal verb correcto para perderse algo.
'However' introduce un punto de vista contrario o diferente.
'Stay in touch with' es la expresión fija para mantener contacto con alguien.
'Played a role' es la colocación correcta para indicar participación o influencia.
'Draw attention to' es la expresión fija para atraer la atención hacia algo.
'Find the right balance' es la colocación natural para encontrar el equilibrio adecuado.
